productName: Torus - Infused Glass Tip - Raspberry Smoothie x Ginger Pop - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Raspberry Smoothie x Ginger Pop flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, tart raspberry flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
